description:
Add tests in workflow_config.rs #[cfg(test)] module:

1. Parse YAML with command phase → phase_definitions populated
2. Parse YAML with manual phase → same
3. Parse YAML with agent profile → agent_profiles populated, fields roundtrip
4. Auto-register phase in phase_catalog with title-cased label
5. tools_allowlist collected
6. mode: "agent" rejected in YAML phases
7. Missing command block for mode: command rejected
8. Merge across files → all three new fields merged correctly
9. Cross-validation passes when phase in phase_definitions but not runtime config
10. Agent profile with system_prompt, model, skills, capabilities deserializes correctly
title: Add tests for YAML phase definitions and agent profiles
